/ABS/REV/SP 16 MONTHS, LOWER TERM/CC/BWR 02-28-96///X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 139 DAYS///X:COUNTY JAIL, 86 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 259 DAYS,//STATES/VF5:$200/CDC/
